testcase.name: test_record_completed_event
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_learn_today_integration.py:66: in test_record_completed_event assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Authentication required"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cooldown_respects_7_day_rule

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'no_auth' in ['cooldown_active', 'no_actionable_items', 'no_recent_activity'] + where 'no_auth' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8346e1bd480>('reason') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8346e1bd480> = {'nudge': None, 'reason': 'no_auth', 'success': True}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_learn_today_integration.py:344: in test_cooldown_respects_7_day_rule assert data1.get("reason") in ["cooldown_active", "no_actionable_items", "no_recent_activity"] E AssertionError: assert 'no_auth' in ['cooldown_active', 'no_actionable_items', 'no_recent_activity'] E + where 'no_auth' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8346e1bd480>('reason') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8346e1bd480> = {'nudge': None, 'reason': 'no_auth', 'success': True}.get
